name: Chicken Adobo
description: is the national dish of the Philippines, featuring chicken braised in a savory, tangy sauce made from soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, bay leaves, and black peppercorns.

name: Chicken Afritada
description: is another popular Filipino dish.  Pieces of chicken are cooked in tomato sauce along with carrots, potatoes and bell peppers.

name: Fried Chicken Legs
description: seasoned with paprika, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper with a dash of chili powder for added flavor.

name: Fried Chicken Wings (Drums and Flats)
description: coated in a seasoned batter or flour mixture and deep-fried until golden, crispy, and crunchy.

name: Fried Chicken Whole
description: recipe is made by dipping it into a spiced batter and deep-frying it to golden perfection.
